data.title: Nasdaq Achieves Record High as Dollar Index Declines Amid Global Developments
data.description:
The Nasdaq Composite Index has reached a new record high, marking its 12th consecutive day of gains. According to PANews, this surge comes amid a ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon, which has lasted for ten days, and potential talks between the United States and Iran expected over the weekend. Meanwhile, the dollar index continues to decline, with major banks expressing bearish sentiments.

In the tech sector, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) has highlighted the growing importance of CPUs in AI data centers, further fueling interest in AMD and Intel stocks. However, Netflix experienced a nearly 10% drop in after-hours trading.

data.title: Gate launches pre-market trading of CHIP perpetual contracts.
data.description: According to official sources, Gate has now launched pre-market trading of CHIP perpetual contracts (USDT settlement), supporting leverage of 1-10x.

data.title: Counterfeit Ledger Nano S Plus Found with Malicious Intent
data.description: A Brazilian security researcher has discovered a counterfeit Ledger Nano S Plus purchased from a Chinese marketplace. According to NS3.AI, the device failed Ledger's Genuine Check upon delivery, indicating it was designed to steal wallet data. The researcher noted that the box's QR code could mislead first-time users to download a malicious version of Ledger Live, which displayed a fake verification screen and exposed seed phrases. Further investigation revealed modified hardware, altered firmware, and the presence of an internal WiFi and Bluetooth antenna.

data.title: CoW Swap Releases Report on Domain Hijacking Incident
data.description:
CoW Swap has published a comprehensive report on a recent domain hijacking incident. According to Foresight News, the event was characterized as a supply chain attack, where the attacker used social engineering tactics targeting the .fi domain registry Traficom and registrar Gandi SAS. This allowed the attacker to redirect the domain's DNS to a Cloudflare server under their control, leading to phishing sites being served to users for several hours.

The CoW Protocol's smart contracts, backend API, solver network, and signature infrastructure remained unaffected, as the attack was confined to the domain registration supply chain level. The team detected the issue within 19 minutes and completed the service migration to cow.finance in approximately 3.5 hours. The domain was fully restored on April 15, with RegistryLock enabled. Preliminary analysis estimates user losses at around $1.2 million.

data.title: A certain HYPE whale unpledged 150,000 HYPE tokens and placed a sell order for 100,000 HYPE tokens.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a HYPE holder unstaking 150,000 HYPE (worth $6.52 million) and placed a sell order for 100,000 HYPE (worth $4.35 million). This whale still holds 354,303 HYPE (worth $15.42 million) in stake.

data.title: Sui Prioritizes South Korean Market Amid Stablecoin Regulation Clarification
data.description: Sui has identified South Korea as its primary focus within the Asian market, aiming to collaborate with financial institutions and major technology companies once the country's stablecoin regulations are clarified. According to NS3.AI, Sui's strategy includes the development of a won-denominated stablecoin, Bitcoin-based financial products, and the utilization of its Move programming language.

data.title: Bitcoin's Recovery Faces Skepticism from High-Leverage Traders
data.description:
Bitcoin's recent climb above $75,000 is facing skepticism from traders who utilize high leverage. According to Bloomberg, these traders are expressing doubts about the sustainability of the cryptocurrency's recovery. The concerns arise from the perception that the rally lacks the necessary support from key market participants who typically drive significant price movements.

The skepticism among leveraged traders highlights a broader uncertainty in the cryptocurrency market. Despite Bitcoin's impressive recovery, the lack of confidence from these influential traders suggests potential volatility ahead. This sentiment reflects a cautious approach, as traders weigh the risks associated with high leverage against the potential for further gains. The situation underscores the complex dynamics at play in the cryptocurrency market, where sentiment can shift rapidly based on various factors, including regulatory developments and macroeconomic trends.

data.title: Osmosis to Remain Independent After Proposal Rejection
data.description:
Cosmos ecosystem decentralized exchange (DEX) Osmosis announced that its proposal to migrate to Cosmos Hub was not approved. According to Foresight News, Osmosis will continue to operate as an independent and profitable chain. In the coming weeks, the team will focus on the next phase of Osmosis, prioritizing user safety and business continuity.

Previously, Osmosis had updated its Cosmos Hub proposal based on feedback from validators and the community. The most significant change was the decision not to mint additional ATOM. Instead, the required ATOM will be gradually purchased on the open market using revenue from the Osmosis DEX protocol for OSMO/ATOM conversion. The total acquisition will remain limited to less than 2.5% of the total ATOM supply.

data.title: Claw Wallet Collaborates to Enhance AI Agent Ecosystem
data.description:
Claw Wallet has announced a strategic collaboration with TagAI and TagClaw to advance the AI Agent ecosystem. According to ChainCatcher, the partnership aims to integrate Claw Wallet's secure AI-native infrastructure with TagAI's AI-driven community layer and TagClaw's on-chain social collaboration network. This integration seeks to establish new standards for AI Agent ecosystems.

The collaboration focuses on incorporating TagClaw's Skill into Claw Wallet, enhancing the intelligent coordination capabilities of AI Agents for seamless and secure on-chain interactions with social attributes. The three parties are currently working on building decentralized AI Agent infrastructure on the BNB Chain, aiming to transform AI Agents from standalone tools into a collaborative social network.

data.title: AI in Finance: Challenges and Considerations
data.description:
PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). Kieran P. Dennis, co-founder of Z Protocol, recently shared a provocative viewpoint on the use of AI in financial management. He likened entrusting an AI agent with financial responsibilities to giving a credit card to a child, suggesting that while setting up automated posts via platforms like OpenClaw is straightforward, entrusting AI with even $100 could lead to significant losses. 

Dennis highlighted several challenges: AI can execute tasks but lacks understanding of consequences, making judgment difficult. Additionally, blockchain transactions are irreversible, meaning funds could be lost if an AI is attacked or misled. Current blockchain infrastructure, including private keys, gas fees, and multi-signature requirements, is not designed with AI in mind, posing further risks.

For AI to be effectively integrated into blockchain finance, Dennis argues that AI must become more intelligent and the underlying cryptographic infrastructure must be more secure and user-friendly. The first to address these issues of trust and secure infrastructure will likely lead the next wave of innovation in this space.

data.title: Arthur Hayes Predicts HYPE Surge to $150 Amid Hyperliquid Developments
data.description: Arthur Hayes has expressed optimism about the potential impact of HIP4 on Hyperliquid's trading volume. According to NS3.AI, Hayes suggested that the value of HYPE could increase to $150. He connected this outlook to binary options on Hyperliquid, sharing his insights in a post on X.

data.title: Asseto CASH+ tokens have been officially included in KuCoin OES recognized collateral assets.
data.description: Asseto, the institutional-grade RWA tokenization platform, has officially included its flagship product CASH+ as an accepted collateral asset in KuCoin's OES (Over-the-Counter) settlement program. CASH+ offers 1:1 exposure to the CMS USD money market fund, with an annualized yield of 3.5-4%. After inclusion in OES, institutional holders can use CASH+ as OES collateral to continuously earn money market returns while unlocking KuCoin trading credit, achieving the dual benefits of "yield + liquidity." Currently, several crypto funds and quantitative trading teams have already configured CASH+ through this framework, using it as margin collateral to gain trading leverage while continuously accumulating money market returns on the underlying fund.

data.title: The market capitalization of the Ethereum blockchain's meme coin ASTEROID has surpassed $15 million, currently trading at $14 million.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the market capitalization of the Ethereum blockchain's Meme coin ASTEROID has surpassed $15 million, currently trading at $14 million. Odaily reminds users that Meme coin prices are highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks. Meme coins generally lack real-world applications and rely more on speculative hype; caution is advised when entering the market.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: Expects a surge in Hyperliquid trading volume; bullish on HYPE to reach $150.
data.description: BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes posted on the X platform that with HIP4 enabling binary options on Hyperliquid, he expects a surge in trading volume. HYPE's price is $150, just the starting point.

data.title: Mizuho: The Bank of Japan is unlikely to raise interest rates in April given the high level of market uncertainty.
data.description: Economists at Mizuho Securities stated that due to high uncertainty surrounding geopolitical risks, the Bank of Japan is unlikely to raise interest rates at its April meeting. The Bank of Japan will make a further decision at its June meeting. The current overnight index swap market projects only a 17% probability of an April rate hike, a significant drop from approximately 60% last week. The Bank of Japan governor has mentioned the dual impact of the Middle East conflict on Japanese price trends. While he did not appear to rule out an April rate hike, he seems inclined to adopt a more cautious approach to further assess the situation. (Jinshi)

data.title: A trader earned a 351-fold return by trading ASTEROID.
data.description: According to Lookonchain's monitoring, the trader spent 11 SOL ($960) to buy 158.51 million ASTEROID through 3 wallets, and then sold 134.75 million ASTEROID to get 1,539 SOL ($135,000), and held the remaining 23.76 million ASTEROID ($202,000).

data.title: After a 2.5-month period of inactivity, a major whale deposited $1.9 million in USDC and used 20x leverage to short the S&P 500 index.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, after a 2.5-month period of inactivity, a whale deposited $1.9 million USDC into HyperLiquid and opened 550 short positions in SP500 with a leverage ratio of 20x.

data.title: Exploring Spain's Tranquil Extremadura: A Refreshing Alternative to Popular Destinations
data.description:
Travelers planning a trip to Spain are encouraged to explore the lesser-known region of Extremadura, offering a serene alternative to the bustling tourist hotspots of Barcelona, Madrid, and Ibiza. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the unique charm and slower pace of life in Extremadura, which provides a refreshing escape from the crowded attractions typically associated with Spain.

Extremadura, located in the western part of the country, is renowned for its rich history, stunning landscapes, and cultural heritage. Visitors can immerse themselves in the region's natural beauty, with its rolling hills, picturesque villages, and historic sites. The area is home to several UNESCO World Heritage sites, including the ancient Roman city of Mérida and the medieval town of Cáceres, offering a glimpse into Spain's past.

In addition to its historical significance, Extremadura is celebrated for its culinary delights. The region is famous for its Iberian ham, cheeses, and wines, providing a gastronomic experience that rivals more well-known Spanish destinations. Travelers can enjoy authentic local cuisine in a relaxed setting, away from the hustle and bustle of major tourist centers.

For those seeking outdoor adventures, Extremadura offers a range of activities, from hiking and birdwatching to exploring its numerous natural parks and reserves. The region's diverse landscapes provide ample opportunities for nature enthusiasts to connect with the environment and enjoy the tranquility of the countryside.

As Spain continues to attract millions of tourists each year, Extremadura stands out as a hidden gem, offering a unique and peaceful experience for those looking to discover a different side of the country. By choosing to visit this unspoiled region, travelers can enjoy a more authentic and intimate connection with Spain's culture and history.

data.title: BlockInvest Secures €4 Million in Strategic Funding Round
data.description:
BlockInvest, a bond tokenization platform, has announced the completion of a €4 million strategic funding round. According to ChainCatcher, Italian banking giant UniCredit participated in the round, acquiring a 16% stake in the company.

BlockInvest is set to assist UniCredit in issuing Italy's first native digital mini-bond and the first public blockchain-based tokenized structured note for wealth management clients. The initiative aims to integrate digital ledger programmability with financial instruments.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Identifies North Korean IT Personnel in Web3 Organizations
data.description:
The Ethereum Foundation has announced that its funded Ketman project has identified 100 North Korean IT personnel infiltrating Web3 organizations over a six-month period. According to ChainCatcher, warnings were issued to approximately 53 projects about the potential employment of these individuals.

The initiative addresses the issue of 'fake developers' within the crypto industry and is part of the ETH Rangers public safety funding program. Ketman has also developed an open-source detection tool for identifying suspicious GitHub activity and collaborated with the Security Alliance to establish an industry framework for recognizing North Korean IT personnel.
